Sector: Transportation and Logistics, Industry: Logistics and Deliveries. # Market Activity. #### LOPI Stock Price. LOPI IDR 169 +1 (+0,59%). Last Update: 18 December 2025, 04:00 PM. The transaction data displayed above is delayed data of approximately 15 minutes. The data displayed on this site is for informational purposes only and cannot be used as a trading reference. # Net Foreign. # Overview. PT Logisticsplus International Tbk (LOPI) is a freight forwarding company that covers domestic and international markets. The company was founded in 2016 in Jakarta. It's a subsidiary of Logistics Plus Inc., an American company, giving it the privilege to use the global network in 180 countries for logistics purposes and international freight forwarding services (import and export clearance, LC document administration, etc.).
